genes.summary: Initialize and validate the tracked GEP events.jsonl append log
signals_match: user_feature_request:| `assets/gep/events.jsonl` | 进化事件追加日志 |
preconditions: assets/gep/events.jsonl exists or can be created
strategy: Add a minimal EvolutionEvent scaffold line to assets/gep/events.jsonl
Keep changes small and match existing JSON/JSONL style
Run node scripts/validate-gep-events.js to verify the log format

genes.summary: innovate strategy: user_feature_request, user_improvement_suggestion, perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, stable_success_plateau, external_opportunity
strategy: Extract opportunity signals and identify the specific user need or system gap
Search existing Genes and Capsules for partial matches (avoid reinventing)
Design a minimal, testable implementation plan (prefer small increments)
Estimate blast radius; innovate changes may touch more files but must stay within constraints
Implement the change with clear validation criteria
Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent with intent=innovate, create new Gene if pattern is novel, create Capsule on success
preconditions: at least one opportunity signal is present

genes.summary: repair strategy: error, exception, failed, unstable
strategy: Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
Select an existing Gene by signals match (no improvisation)
Estimate blast radius (files, lines) before editing
Apply smallest reversible patch
Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
Solidify knowledge: append EvolutionEvent, update Gene/Capsule store

genes.summary: Football lottery betting analysis with odds comparison
strategy: Collect relevant data from official sources
Analyze patterns and extract key features
Process and validate information accuracy
Generate structured output with scores
Store results for future reference
